text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Attention Is All You Need" is definitively real, published at NeurIPS 2017 (NIPS'17), with an arXiv entry (1706.03762) and an ACM DL page. The cited authors — Vaswani, Shazeer, Parmar, Uszkoreit, Jones, Gomez, Kaiser, and Polosukhin — exactly match the real paper's author list. The automated checker result appears to be a false negative.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762
